Variables.Name: Settings
Variables.Description: Post process settings to use for this volume.

Variables.Name: Priority
Variables.Description:
Priority of this volume. In the case of overlapping volumes the one with the highest priority
	  overrides the lower priority ones. The order is undefined if two or more overlapping volumes have the same priority.

Variables.Name: BlendRadius
Variables.Description: World space radius around the volume that is used for blending (only if not unbound).

Variables.Name: bEnabled
Variables.Description: Whether this volume is enabled or not.

Variables.Name: bUnbound
Variables.Description: Whether this volume covers the whole world, or just the area inside its bounds.

Functions.Name: AddOrUpdateBlendable
Functions.Description: Adds an Blendable (implements IBlendableInterface) to the array of Blendables (if it doesn't exist) and update the weight
